query:
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, passwordHash, loginMethod, role, clientId) VALUES
('test-newlantern-1', 'New Lantern Admin', 'admin@newlantern.ai', '$2b$10$YourHashHere', 'email', 'admin', NULL),
('test-srv-1', 'SRV Admin', 'admin@srv.com', '$2b$10$YourHashHere', 'email', 'admin', 2),
('test-radone-1', 'RadOne Admin', 'admin@radone.com', '$2b$10$YourHashHere', 'email', 'admin', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=name;
